title: Retry with capped backoff and jitter
description: Retries use exponential backoff with full jitter, a max attempt count, and only on retryable errors.
body: Use when calling a dependency that can fail transiently (timeout, 503, connection reset). Do not retry non-idempotent operations or non-retryable errors (400/validation/auth). Actions: classify the error as retryable or terminal; apply exponential backoff with full jitter (sleep = random(0, min(cap, base*2^attempt))); cap attempts and total deadline. Validation signals include a test that retries stop after the cap and that backoff spreads in time rather than firing in lockstep. Risk boundary: retrying without a cap or jitter can amplify an outage into a self-inflicted thundering herd.
